text: Being here, I feel a curious sense of liminality—a threshold between arrival and engagement. The first image’s corridor and glass evoke distances, boundaries, and anticipations. The blue neon pulses with technological promise, yet I am held in anticipation, breathing deeply. Entering the vivid, information-rich space in the second image, I am carried by a clinical logic but remain slightly untethered, as though observing my own presence. I feel not anxiety, but a soft vigilance—a pause before participation, an inhale before insight.
